steps.title: Apply the given relationship by substitution
steps.content:
We're given $v = 6w$ and need to find what $3v$ equals. Substitute the relationship directly into the expression:
$$3v = 3(6w)$$

steps.title: Multiply to get the answer
steps.content:
Multiply the coefficient 3 by the expression in parentheses:
$$3(6w) = 18w$$
This confirms A is correct.
